name: @hyperprior/pi-review
description: Structured review findings for code review workflows
readme:
# @hyperprior/pi-review

Structured findings tool for code review (`report_finding`).

## Installation

```bash
pi install npm:@hyperprior/pi-review
```

## Features

- `report_finding` tool emits normalized review issues with:
  - `P0`–`P3` priority scale
  - confidence score
  - file + line range
- findings are tracked per branch via branch session entries
- `/hyper-review` command to view, inspect counts (`stats`), or clear state

## Usage

```json
{
  "tool": "report_finding",
  "title": "Validate JSON output before shelling out",
  "body": "Potential injection issue appears when command args are user-provided and unescaped.",
  "priority": "P1",
  "confidence": 0.83,
  "file_path": "src/transform.ts",
  "line_start": 42,
  "line_end": 46
}
```

- `/hyper-review` — show rendered findings grouped by priority
- `/hyper-review stats` — show summary counts
- `/hyper-review clear` — clear branch state

## Notes

All plugins in this monorepo are namespaced under `@hyperprior` and built to be loaded as individual pi packages.
